'''Tensh Ly'alu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[New Jedi Order]]. His first assignment, upon reaching the rank of Jedi Knight, was to monitor the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], both for [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] and to watch for Jedi interests on [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He felt he could do it but after discovering that most Twi'leks communicated with their [[Lekku/Legends|lekku]], suddenly was floundering. In an effort to enhance his fantastic information gathering skills, he attempted to learn the language but struggled.
